---
title: "Intro to Statistics: Review"
crossref:
  lst-title: "🎯 Checkpoint 2."
  lst-labels: alpha a
format: live-html
sidebar: lesson-5
---

:::{.ltblue-container}
**Checkpoints on this Page:**

- [**Checkpoint 2.a:** Import Buoy Data](#lst-getcsv)
- [**Checkpoint 2.b:** Calculate Minimum and Maximum](#lst-minmaxlen)
:::
<hr>

```{pyodide}
#| include: false
import requests
import csv
from io import StringIO

def load_class_data(csv_url):
    response = requests.get(csv_url)
    reader = csv.reader(StringIO(response.text))
    next(reader)  # Skip header
    rows = list(reader)
    
    knox_nitrate = [float(row[0]) for row in rows if row[0].strip()]
    greene_nitrate = [float(row[1]) for row in rows if len(row) > 1 and row[1].strip()]
    
    return knox_nitrate, greene_nitrate
```

:::{#lst-getcsv}

:::{.dkorange-container}
Import the buoy data from Cove Creek (Greene Co.) and Second Creek (Knoxville).

No code edits needed! Click the ▶️ Run Code button to run the block.
:::

```{pyodide}
#| persist: true
#| completion: false
csv_url = "https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/e/2PACX-1vSW_8RlRGj_e_WRurjN5hJr6KXhyK2DlujrV0xCLGCXxv698jTRBmpRO-aqHH-RaCvWep61tYE0_C7S/pub?gid=0&single=true&output=csv"

knox_nitrate, greene_nitrate = load_class_data(csv_url)

print("Knoxville (Second Creek) Nitrate values:", knox_nitrate)
print("Greene County (Cove Creek) Nitrite values:", greene_nitrate)
```

Import the buoy data!
:::

:::{#lst-minmaxlen}

```{pyodide}
#| persist: true
#| completion: false

min_knox = min(knox_nitrate)
max_knox = max(knox_nitrate)
len_knox = len(knox_nitrate)
```

```{pyodide}
#| persist: true
#| completion: false

min_greene = min(greene_nitrate)
max_greene = max(greene_nitrate)
len_greene = len(greene_nitrate)
```

Find the minimum, maximum, and length of the buoy data.
:::
